# Alexandre Larue

## About
Full Stack Developer specialized in Cloud Computing, DevOps and backend architectures.

## Projects

- NohamDrive:
  Personal cloud storage platform built with Nuxt, FastAPI and MinIO.

- Converter:
  Desktop file converter built with Rust and Tauri.
